indicator_types.name: Exposed Instance IP (IPv4)
indicator_types.description: IPv4 addresses hosting exposed AI agent instances discovered by DECLAWED scanning.

indicator_types.name: Exposed Instance IP (IPv6)
indicator_types.description: IPv6 addresses hosting exposed AI agent instances.

indicator_types.name: CVE Detection
indicator_types.description: Known CVE identifiers detected on exposed AI agent instances through version fingerprinting and vulnerability assessment.

indicator_types.name: Malicious Skill Hash
indicator_types.description: Cryptographic hashes (SHA-256, MD5) of confirmed malicious ClawHub skills.

indicator_types.name: C2 Domain
indicator_types.description: Command-and-control domain names used by confirmed malicious ClawHub skills for callbacks, data exfiltration, or command retrieval.

indicator_types.name: C2 Infrastructure IP
indicator_types.description: IP addresses of command-and-control infrastructure associated with malicious ClawHub skills.

indicator_types.name: CISA KEV Entry
indicator_types.description: CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities flagged on exposed instances. Indicates vulnerabilities actively being exploited in the wild.

indicator_types.name: ASN/Network Data
indicator_types.description: Autonomous system number and network ownership data for hosting infrastructure of exposed instances.

indicator_types.name: Instance Geolocation
indicator_types.description: Country-level geolocation of exposed AI agent instances derived from IP geolocation databases.

indicator_types.name: Platform Fingerprint
indicator_types.description: Version and configuration fingerprint of the AI agent platform (OpenClaw/MoltBot/ClawdBot). Includes platform version, installed skills, authentication state, and exposed endpoints.

indicator_types.name: Breach Linkage
indicator_types.description: Association between an exposed AI agent instance's hosting infrastructure and previously reported data breaches.

indicator_types.name: APT Activity Association
indicator_types.description: Association between an exposed AI agent instance's hosting infrastructure and known APT (Advanced Persistent Threat) activity.
